---
name: Bug report
about: Something on the box misbehaves
labels: bug
---

**What happened / what did you expect?**

**Setup**

- Board: (e.g. Raspberry Pi 5 8GB)
- OS: (e.g. Raspberry Pi OS trixie, labwc)
- TV + remote: (brand/model - CEC quirks are very TV-specific)
- App involved: (launcher / livetv / plex / youtube / spotify / …)

**Logs**
Shell log lines if you have them (run `~/.tvbox/run-shell.sh` from SSH to see
them live), or `~/.tvbox/cec_raw.log` for remote/CEC issues.
